title: U-Shape Height Adjustable Desk Suite Zira

specs.dimensions: Height-adjustable desk available 60"–84"W; adjustment range 29.5"/30"–49"/49.5"H; U-shape suite typically configured with ~72"W desk + bridge + credenza/hutch
specs.weight_capacity: 265 lbs lift capacity (per price list); some configurations rated up to 350 lbs
specs.materials: Thermally fused laminate work surfaces and storage components; steel height-adjustable base with dual motors integrated into columns
key_features: 2-stage dual-motor height-adjustable desk with motors mounted inside columns (no separate control box)
U-shape configuration: height-adjustable desk + bridge with modesty panel + credenza with box/box/file pedestal + hutch
2 glazing options with 2 frame finishes for doors
Optional frameless glass sliding doors on hutches
specs.notes: 'U-Shape Height Adjustable Desk Suite Zira' is a configured suite rather than a single SKU — Zira is a component-based system built from dozens of part numbers (desk shell, height-adjustable base Z108, bridge, credenza, hutch, pedestal). Exact model codes depend on BBI's specific configuration; confirm the bill of materials with BBI or the original Global quote. Finish list reflects Global's standard Zira laminate palette from the 2021 price list; verify current availability as Global periodically updates finishes.
